steps.title: Identify the alignment between attitude and motto
steps.content: The key signal is that the motto “What do I know?” is an expression of the “questioning [of] his own perspective” described in the prior sentence — they illustrate the same intellectual trait, so they fit together rather than contrast.

steps.title: Match the alignment to the choices
steps.content: ”Fittingly” shows this natural fit — the motto appropriately exemplifies his questioning approach. The other three introduce unwanted contrast, reversal, or time shift. This matches choice C — C is correct.
